lore.shinycookie.star_cookie: Feed to a Pokemon for a chance to turn it Shiny! Season with Stardust to boost the chance.
lore.shinycookie.burnt_star_cookie: Feed to a Shiny Pokemon to remove its shiny status and return 1 Stardust.
lore.shinycookie.stardust: Use as seasoning when cooking a Star Cookie to increase its shiny chance.
